'''zamanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobname|jobname]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-m-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobname|jobname]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zamanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæmængæth|zæmængæth]] || [[word:zæmængæj|zæmængæj]] || [[word:zæmængæsh|zæmængæsh]] || [[word:zæmængæ|zæmængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zamamangath|zamamangath]] || [[word:zamamangaj|zamamangaj]] || [[word:zamamangash|zamamangash]] || [[word:zamamanga|zamamanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zamangath|zamangath]] || [[word:zamangaj|zamangaj]] || [[word:zamangash|zamangash]] || [[word:zamanga|zamanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zamafngath|zamafngath]] || [[word:zamafngaj|zamafngaj]] || [[word:zamafngash|zamafngash]] || [[word:zamafngaf|zamafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zamangatha|zamangatha]] || [[word:zamangaja|zamangaja]] || [[word:zamangasha|zamangasha]] || [[word:zamangaka|zamangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zamangath|zamangath]] || [[word:zamangaj|zamangaj]] || [[word:zamangash|zamangash]] || [[word:zamanga|zamanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zamangathal|zamangathal]] || [[word:zamangajal|zamangajal]] || [[word:zamangashal|zamangashal]] || [[word:zamangakal|zamangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zamangathatha|zamangathatha]] || [[word:zamangajaja|zamangajaja]] || [[word:zamangashasha|zamangashasha]] || [[word:zamangaka|zamangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zamangathan|zamangathan]] || [[word:zamangajan|zamangajan]] || [[word:zamangashan|zamangashan]] || [[word:zamangakan|zamangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zamangathaoro|zamangathaoro]] || [[word:zamangajaoro|zamangajaoro]] || [[word:zamangashaoro|zamangashaoro]] || [[word:zamangakaoro|zamangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
